name: Etelvino Lins
description: Etelvino Lins foi político pernambucano ligado à administração estadual. As conexões com a Ponte do Pina e a Ponte Motocolombó indicam sua presença na memória das obras viárias e da circulação urbana no Recife.
de: Etelvino Lins was a Pernambuco politician linked to the state administration. His connections with the Ponte do Pina and the Ponte Motocolombó indicate his presence in the memory of road works and urban circulation in Recife.
